TextRun.Text: take new measures to do sth.

RichText.Text: 1. conduct/carry out a research/study 2. have an effect/impact/influence on... 3. its surroundings or related issues 4. in environmental impact studies 5. include experts from different fields 6. seek to clear up any problems 7. evaluate educational programs 8. take new measures to do sth. 9.Children in the program perform better than those who do not take part. 10. A crucial step involves surveying the local species. 11. A project may continue despite negative findings if the benefit outweigh the cost. 12. This shows how careful and detailed these studies are and how small factors can matter. 13. Any species found to be in danger could significantly affect the final decision regarding the project.

TextRun.Text: 4. 在环境影响评估研究中
即便调研结果不理想，若收益
高于成本，项目仍会继续推进。
这体现出这类研究多么认真细致，也说明细微因素也至关重要。

RichText.Text: 1. 做/执行/开展研究 2. 对…… 产生影响 3. 周边环境及相关问题 4. 在环境影响评估研究中 5. 吸纳各领域专家 6. 设法解决各类问题 7. 评估教育项目 8. 采取新措施做某事 9. 参与该项目的孩子表现 优于未参与者。 10.关键环节是调研当地物种。 11. 即便调研结果不理想，若收益 高于成本，项目仍会继续推进。 12. 这体现出这类研究多么认真细致，也说明细微因素也至关重要。 13. 任何被发现的濒危物种，都 会极大影响关于项目的最终决策。
